response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for this junior role, has no demonstrated experience in insurance or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Primary language experience is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not Java
German language skill is only basic, not sufficient for client-facing roles
Overqualified and senior-level background misaligned with junior position
